General.Name: Central China Real Estate Ltd
General.Description: Central China Real Estate Limited, an investment holding company, engages in property development business primarily in the People's Republic of China. The company develops residential and commercial properties; property leasing; and hotel operations. It also provides project management services. Central China Real Estate Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Zhengzhou, the People's Republic of China.
